title: Sarovar Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Sarovar Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Sarovar Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sarovar Hotels:
Sarovar Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sarovar Hotels!
